title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo and Alex Kantrowitz discuss predicted IPOs for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Topics include differences between the companies, capital sourcing, platform dynamics, and broader implications for AI winners and the tech industry landscape.
